allow: Bash(python3 -c "s=open\('style.css'\).read\(\); print\('open braces:', s.count\('{'\), 'close braces:', s.count\('}'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import scholarly; print\('scholarly present', scholarly.__version__ if hasattr\(scholarly,'__version__'\) else '?'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('publications.json'\)\); [print\(f\\"{p['year']} | {p['venue']} | cited {p['citations']}\\"\) for p in d['publications']]")
